task: calgetres schema discovery + Tokyo May-2026 baseline open-slot snapshot

results.label: calgetres-request-shape
results.description: Full request shape for /calgetres month-availability endpoint, derived from MKAYMA001common.js#getVacancyInformation + curl probe.
results.how_computed: Read MKAYMA001common.js line 43; confirmed via curl probe at 2026-05-08 ~08:55 JST.
results.notes: If the front-end deploys a new MKAYMAXXX bundle, re-derive — site routinely ships per-prefecture variants.

results.label: calgetres-response-shape

value.code: string — 'A0001' = success, others see senddata.js error handling
value.currenttime: string — server epoch as float seconds; client must be within 86400s

results.notes: calgetres returns per-slot for the whole month — do NOT need /getres for v0 polling.

results.label: tokyo-2026-05-baseline-open-counts
results.description: Empirical open-slot counts (slots where capacity > reservation) for Tokyo's 3 試験場 × {KYOSOTSU=11, KYOSOTSU-MAINA=61} for date=202605, captured 2026-05-08 ~08:55 JST.
results.valid_for: Snapshot at 2026-05-08 ~08:55 JST. Decays continuously — re-probe before use.
results.notes: Counter-intuitive finding: 11 and 61 yield different open counts (esp. 江東 6 vs 2), contradicting the front-end detailToBasicCodeMap collapsing 61→11. The two license types must occupy separate seat pools server-side; for the user (KYOSOTSU=11), poll coursecode=11 only. mynumber-merged users must poll 61 separately.

results.label: tos-critical-articles
results.description: Articles in 利用規約 (MKAYMA00M016 in MKAYMA001MessagesJa.js, effective 2025-03-04) that constrain this project.

value.Article-7: System available 24/365 in principle; may be suspended without prior notice.
value.Article-8(4): Use for promotion / advertisement / solicitation / business activities is prohibited without prior MPD approval. → Hard blocker for v2 SaaS.
value.Article-8(8): Acts that unjustly interfere with system operation OR infringe other users' rights are prohibited. → Sole soft constraint on v0 polling frequency.
value.Article-9: Personal info entered into the system used only for booking. → v0 enters none, compliant.

results.how_computed: Inspected JS string MKAYMA00M016_en in MKAYMA001MessagesJa.js (line 72), 2026-05-08.
results.notes: Robots.txt is 404 (catch-all SPA fallback) — Article 8(8) is the only operational constraint. ADR-2 derives 10 min/cycle from this.
